questionHtml:
Which solution neutralizes 50.0 cm3 of 0.120 mol dm–3 NaOH (aq)?

A. 12.5 cm3 of 0.080 mol dm–3 H3PO4

B. 25.0 cm3 of 0.120 mol dm–3 CH3COOH

C. 25.0 cm3 of 0.120 mol dm–3 H2SO4

D. 50.0 cm3 of 0.060 mol dm–3 HNO3
